title: Dressrosa Is Free — Closing Beat
description: The Birdcage disappears, Doflamingo falls, and Dressrosa begins to breathe again.
scene: On pages 15–17, King Riku, Dressrosa Citizens, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Rebecca deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luuu Quuu ...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...CNYY MYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: UuuW WaaAA AAAA AAAA AAAAH !!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You actually friggin' diiiid it.!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: BGGGH UHRBBV BALLY BGIRH ITD!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even toys have things they wish to protect.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: These tin eyes may be unable to shed tears, however...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The Commander battled for ten long years all by his lonesome!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ten Long Years Ago!! This battle began!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: King Riku's honor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And our freedom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: walk

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Please please

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: forced to surrender it all...while filled with remorse and regret.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This battle was a fight to reclaim it all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Just because a country has col- lapsed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: does not necessarily mean it is devoid of happiness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: For today, the people of this country... amidst the disrepair, rubble and debris... wept tears of joy....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Amidst the disrepair, rubble and debris... wept tears of joy....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: The Fated Grand Showdown has finally been settled!!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
